posture: 50 roles · 19 strong-act · 2 recruiter day-rate contracts worth fast action — Monday morning run: a standout fresh C-suite governance/risk match (Harding & Drougas 'Chief of Quality, Governance & Risk', newly created exec reporting to CEO with Board exposure) plus two new Sydney CFO searches (Perigon hedge-fund CFO; ThompsonCook PE CFO ~$450k) and a Reo Group Divisional Head of Finance ($250-270k), on top of a fully re-verified recruiter-held risk/compliance surface (Robert Half x8 incl. two day-rate compliance contracts) and the still-live Moir CFO, OneSchool GRC Director, Cuscal SM Finance-Risk contract and Shippit interim FC
summary: Monday morning scan. The clear standout is a newly created executive role — Chief of Quality, Governance & Risk (recruiter Harding & Drougas), reporting directly to the CEO with Board exposure and owning enterprise governance, clinical/quality, risk and WHS for a large, highly regulated (clinical/healthcare) organisation — a direct C-suite match to your FAICD/governance strength, browser-verified live today. Two fresh Sydney CFO searches also surfaced (Perigon Group for a global hedge-fund manager, and ThompsonCook 'CFO | Private Equity' at ~$450k) plus a Reo Group Divisional Head of Finance ($250-270k) — all genuine finance-leadership matches but each carries a sector/experience gate (funds-management, PE value-creation/exit), so they sit at watch. Robert Half's full Sydney risk/compliance and senior-finance desk was browser-verified live this run: the Senior Risk & Compliance Manager and Compliance Manager | Digital Infrastructure, two Senior Manager Risk & Compliance roles, two day-rate ($500-800/day) Senior Compliance Manager contracts, a Senior Finance Manager ($190-220k) and Group Finance Manager, plus the Internal Audit Manager and Governance Manager/Assistant Company Secretary. The Moir Group CFO, OneSchool Global Regional GRC Director, Cuscal Senior Manager Finance Risk (contract), Revesby CRO, Peninsula Head of Compliance & Risk and Shippit interim Financial Controller were all individually re-verified live, and the Lanson Regulatory Reporting Advisory Senior Manager and Bluefin day-rate Commercial Advisory (Finance Transformation) contract were confirmed live in the Seek recency battery. Two live recruiter day-rate contracts are on the board, so the standing reminder holds: being CV-current and registered with the risk/finance contract specialists (Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half, Sharp & Carter) is where the fast, unadvertised interim work comes from. Browser-verified this run: Robert Half (full Sydney compliance/finance board) and Seek (senior-manager-risk and head-of-finance recency batteries plus the individually re-checked carried roles). I Work for NSW, Board Direction and AICD Directorship Opportunities (member-gated) were covered via search-assisted discovery only — a manual look at those, and at the AICD gate, remains worthwhile.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government prequalification scheme through which agencies appoint independent chairs and members to their audit and risk committees.
items.so_what: Direct fit for your FCPA/FAICD audit-and-risk-committee profile and existing NED experience; register on the panel to be drawn on as agencies refresh committees.

items.headline: Company Secretary — The Skin Hospital, Darlinghurst (Sydney)
items.summary: Board-level company secretary for a not-for-profit specialist hospital, covering governance, board papers and statutory compliance.
items.so_what: Governance/company-secretary fit close to your board background; still live from last week.

items.headline: Company Secretary — recruiter-held, Sydney (Profusion PAC)
items.summary: Recruiter-managed company secretary role for a Sydney organisation, focused on board governance and statutory duties.
items.so_what: Another company-secretary option matching your governance/NED experience; recruiter-held, so register interest directly.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director & committee vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Aggregated board/NED and committee vacancies nationally, added daily; the platform continues to list fresh roles across education, environment, housing, community, aged care and professional services this week.
items.so_what: Browse for risk/audit-committee and energy/local-government boards that suit an interstate-travel cadence; situational awareness rather than a single role.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's member-only Directorship Opportunities board adds roughly 15 roles a week; only public teasers are visible here.
items.so_what: As an FAICD, worth a manual login to DO — the strongest board supply is behind this gate and not visible to this scan.

items.headline: Chief of Quality, Governance & Risk — recruiter-held, flexible NSW/Sydney (Harding & Drougas)
items.summary: Newly created executive role providing independent enterprise oversight of quality, clinical governance, risk and WHS for a large, values-led clinical/healthcare organisation; reports directly to the CEO with regular Board interaction and leads an established multidisciplinary team.
items.so_what: Standout fresh C-suite match to your FAICD/governance and risk-leadership strength with a build-the-function mandate and Board exposure; recruiter-held and browser-verified live today — contact Harding & Drougas (Ben Drougas) early.

items.headline: Chief Financial Officer — purpose-led organisation, Sydney (Hybrid) (Moir Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent CFO owning the finance function — strategy, planning, reporting, treasury, investments, statutory reporting and governance/risk — for a values-driven Sydney organisation, partnering the board and executive team.
items.so_what: Strong direct CFO match to your FCPA finance-leadership profile with an explicit governance/risk remit; recruiter-held and re-verified live this run — contact Moir Group early.

items.headline: Executive Director, Finance & Corporate Services — CatholicCare, Lewisham (Sydney)
items.summary: Permanent CFO-equivalent executive leading finance and corporate services for a large Sydney not-for-profit; full-time, on-site/hybrid in the inner-west.
items.so_what: Strong direct match to your CFO/COO-track finance leadership and FCPA credential in an NFP setting; still live (closes ~14 Jul) — move early.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent CRO building and owning the enterprise risk and compliance framework for a large registered club group.
items.so_what: Direct CRO match in Sydney metro suited to your risk leadership; re-verified live this run and a standout C-suite opening.

items.headline: Chief Financial Officer — global hedge-fund manager, Sydney CBD (Hybrid) (Perigon Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent CFO leading the international finance team of an established hedge-fund manager, owning fund reporting and valuations, treasury/financing, tax, financial and regulatory reporting, risk/governance/internal controls and operational finance.
items.so_what: Genuine CFO match with a clear risk/governance remit for your FCPA profile, but 'significant funds-management experience required' is a real sector gate against your energy/utilities/local-gov/insurance strengths — worth a direct approach to Perigon but a judgement call.

items.headline: Chief Financial Officer | Private Equity — recruiter-held, Sydney CBD (~$450k) (ThompsonCook)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent CFO for a private-equity-backed company, acting as commercial co-pilot to the CEO and founders — driving value creation, leading M&A end-to-end, owning working capital/treasury/funding and investor-grade reporting and governance ahead of a future exit.
items.so_what: Top-of-market CFO package and a strong finance-leadership fit, but the mandate is gated on proven PE value-creation and a successful exit track record, a specialisation stretch against your background — a watch rather than an immediate act.

items.headline: Divisional Head of Finance — recruiter-held, Sydney ($250-270k + 20% bonus) (Reo Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held senior finance-leadership role heading the finance function for a division of a Sydney business, on a $250-270k package plus 20% bonus.
items.so_what: Head-of-finance level and package are a strong core-target match for your FCPA finance-leadership profile; recruiter-held and confirmed live this run — worth a direct approach to Reo Group, sitting at watch pending the detailed scope.
